chapters.title: Understanding Tithi & Karyakatva
chapters.content_preview: 1. Understanding Tithi & Karyakatva  In Vedic Panchang, a Tithi represents a lunar day calculated by the 12-degree angular separation between the Sun and the Moon. Karyakatva refers to the inherent purpose, behavioral qualities, and cosmic tasks assigned to these individual lunar

chapters.title: Dual Planetary Rulership Framework
chapters.content_preview: 3. Dual Planetary Rulership Framework  Rulership shifts depending on the system. Under the Element View (Mahabhuta), Guru rules the Jaya group (3rd, 8th, 13th), while Saturn rules Purna. Under the Sequential View, planets cycle through individual days: Sun (1,9), Moon (2,10), Mar
